As a hacker this is why I love working with journalists- there is an emotional momentum to finding a part of a story or solving a problem that makes it very easy for me to spend dozens of hours straight working towards a single goal- but it’s hard to replicate in my personal work

If I can get someone else excited about an idea I have, I can usually build it in a day. 

If it’s an idea I have trouble explaining or only I like, it usually drags on for weeks and I rarely finish it. 

This is my curse.
